question: Find the name and website link of the channels that have more than one program.
sql: SELECT channel.Name, channel.Internet FROM channel JOIN program ON channel.Channel_ID = program.Channel_ID GROUP BY channel.Channel_ID HAVING COUNT(program.Program_ID) > 1;

back_translation.intent: 查找具有多个节目的频道名称和互联网信息

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求查找具有多个节目的频道名称和网站链接，但SQL反向翻译的描述中未明确体现'具有多个节目'的过滤条件，且group_by字段应为channel.Name而非channel.Channel_ID。
